core_rule: T6 pressure must terminate as either a bounded proposition or a capability-stop packet. Current evidence supports the capability-stop packet.
must_not_infer: fixtures should be expanded by default

safe_next_human_choices.meaning: Improve the current registry/reachability profile so loop/tie trigger surfaces are structurally represented, without inventing values.
Create an explicit synthetic registry variant designed to expose a loop or move-tie trigger, then test T6 against that bounded variant.
Keep T6 preserved until a later capability layer exists.
Record that the current registry has no contractable T6 trigger surface, without making a universal claim about T6.
